description:
Provide the lightweight scheduled-job substrate for reconciliation and maintenance tasks.

**Scope**
- Use EventBridge schedules plus Lambda handlers for MDI reconciliation, Stripe/MDI billing reconciliation, retention sweeps, and periodic health checks as needed.
- Keep handlers bounded and idempotent.
- Register alarms for repeated failures.
- Do not create an ECS/Fargate worker service or always-on background process for launch.

**Acceptance**
- A sample scheduled Lambda runs in staging and writes a harmless heartbeat/status record.
- Job retry/failure behavior is documented.
- Reconciliation tickets can depend on this without introducing ECS/App Runner workers.
title: Scheduled Lambda jobs + EventBridge
